title: eisakouo #1522
definition:
1) to give heed to, comply with admonition, to obey
 2) to listen to, assent to, a request, to be heard, have request
    granted
    2a) of persons offering prayers to God
    2b) of prayers offered up
nasbUsage:

 2) to listen to, assent to, a request, to be heard, have request

    NASB:  to listen, to obey:
